name: Blade Dancer
skill_proficiencies: Choose 3 from Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception, Performance, Persuasion, Sleight of Hand, Stealth
starting_equipment: Choose A or B: (A) Rapier, Leather Armor, 2 Daggers, Explorer's Pack, 15 GP; or (B) 60 GP

features.name: Dancing Style
features.description: You adopt a particular style of combat. Choose one of the following options. You can't take the same Dancing Style option more than once, even if you get to choose again.

features.name: Flourish
features.description: When you hit a creature with a weapon attack, you can expend one Blade Dancer die (a d6) to add it to the damage roll. The die increases to d8 at level 5, d10 at level 11, and d12 at level 17.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: You can attack twice instead of once whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

features.name: Evasion
features.description: When you are subjected to an effect that allows you to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, you instead take no damage if you succeed on the saving throw, and only half damage if you fail.

features.name: Whirling Defence
features.description: As a reaction when a creature you can see attacks you, you can make one melee weapon attack against that creature.

features.name: Death Flourish
features.description: Your weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20. If you already have a feature that expands your critical range, expand it by one more.

name: Assimilator
skill_proficiencies: Choose 2 from  Acrobatics, History, Insight, Nature, Perception, Survival
starting_equipment: A robe of colour and style attributed to the chosen Inclination; Choose A or B (A) a dungeoneer's pack or (B) an explorer's pack

features.name: Adaptation
features.description: At 1st level, you choose an Inclination that represents the type of assimilation you are undergoing. This choice grants you features at 1st level and again at 7th, 9th, and 15th level. The options for this feature are: Aqua Adaptation, Ignis Adaptation, Ventus Adaptation and Terra Adaptation.

features.name: Hit Die
features.description: (Default: D8- Change in save file) Your hit die depends on your chosen Inclination: 1d12 (Terra), 1d10 (Aqua), 1d8 (Ignis), 1d6 (Ventus) per Assimilator level

features.name: Saving Throw Proficiencies
features.description: (Default: CON and DEX- Change in save file) Your saving throw proficiencies depend on your chosen Inclination: Constitution (All), Strength (Terra), Dexterity (Aqua), Charisma (Ignis) and Wisdom (Ventus)

features.name: Skill Proficiencies
features.description: Each Subclass offers an additional proficiency added to this list of options: Athletics (Terra), Medicine (Aqua), Intimidation (Ignis) and Stealth (Ventus)

features.name: Brutal Connection
features.description: Whenever you make an Unarmed Attack while wearing no armour/wielding no shield and that you are within the appropriate range (detailed in Subclasses) of your designated adaptation, you can enhance your unarmed strikes with the characteristics of your chosen adaptation. The range starts at 5 feet and increases by another 5 feet at levels 5, 9, 13 and 17.

features.name: Creative Propulsion I
features.description: At 2nd level, you start to become more accustomed to using your adaptation freely. Using your adaptation, you increase your speed by 10ft. This increases by 5 feet at levels 6, 10, 14 and 18.

features.name: Creative Propulsion II
features.description: At 9th level, you further this creativity and connection to your adaptation. You can now hover.

features.name: Creative Propulsion III
features.description: At 15th level, you truly are starting to assimilate to your chosen adaptation. You gain a flying speed equal to your walking speed.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th and 16th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature, unless you are above level 20. You can also use this to gain a feat instead.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Beginning at 5th level, you can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

features.name: Immutable Force
features.description: By 6th level the unification of your body, spirit and the world around you becomes channeled into your strikes and power. The damage type you deal with your Brutal Connection feature is considered Magical and resistance to this type can be ignored.

features.name: Understanding of the World
features.description: At 10th level, your insight into your adaptation has increased greatly since the start of your journey. The way you perceive the world is influenced greatly by the element you are assimilating with. You may choose two skill proficiencies. Your proficiency bonus is doubled for any ability check that uses either of the chosen proficiencies.

features.name: Everchanging Physiology
features.description: At 13th level, you are beginning to become one with your adaptation. You now no longer need a source of your assimilation to use it, as it is now coming from yourself. Additionally, as you are more a part of nature than creature, thus you are more resistant to regular ways of injury. You gain resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing and Slashing damage.

features.name: As One
features.description: At 20th level, you have done it. You have completely assimilated with your adaptation. You are it; it is you. You gain Resistance to  Magical Bludgeoning, Piercing and Slashing damage and Immunity to Non-Magical Bludgeoning, Piercing and Slashing damage.
